headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Walmart (WMT) Expanding Into Higher-Margin Services And Ultra-Fast Delivery
summary: In late May 2026, Walmart reported first-quarter revenue of US$177,751 million and net income of US$5,330 million, while also showcasing new partnerships, product launches, and faster delivery capabilities across health, fashion, technology, and virtual care. Together, these developments highlight Walmart’s push beyond traditional retail into higher-margin services like memberships, advertising, healthcare, and ultra-fast fulfillment, even as management strikes a cautious tone on cost...

headline: Is Big Tech Creating a National Security Crisis? Pentagon Says U.S. Troops Were Targeted Using Ad Data
summary: Advertising has quietly become the economic engine powering much of the modern internet. For years, investors viewed digital ads as a simple growth story — more users, more engagement, more revenue. But what happens when the same data used to sell sneakers and streaming subscriptions can also be used to track American troops? That question ... Is Big Tech Creating a National Security Crisis? Pentagon Says U.S. Troops Were Targeted Using Ad Data
